name: deal-bot
description: Deal Bot India v4 - Real product URLs, multi-affiliate networks, autonomous distribution

scripts.scrape: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const s = new (require('./src/dealScraper'))(); s.scrapeAll().then(d => { console.log(JSON.stringify(d, null, 2)); process.exit(0); });"
scripts.growth: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const g = new (require('./src/growthEngine'))(); g.setupBotCommands().then(() => console.log('Done'));"
scripts.campaigns: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const r = new (require('./src/affiliateRouter'))(); r.getOpenCampaigns().then(c => console.log(JSON.stringify(c.map(x => x.name || x.advertiser_name), null, 2)));"
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('Run: npm run scrape, npm run start, or npm run validate')"

author: Azil135-sketch
